root-question.text: Is tracing instrumentation present (per-segment spans available)?

question.text: Are ≥30 samples available in the observation window?
Which segment exceeds its budget by the largest margin (over_budget_max)?

branch.conclusion: Optimise prefix caching: stabilise system prompt, add cache_control markers, raise cache_hit_rate target.
Reduce output length OR switch to a faster model in the same family; verify trajectory eval did not regress.
Optimise the named tool (parallelise calls, cache results, replace upstream provider).
All segments within budget but end-to-end exceeds SLA → SLA is too aggressive; renegotiate.
Extend observation window; sample older traces. Recommendations on n<30 are unreliable.
Instrument tracing first (OTel / LangSmith). No useful waterfall without spans.

example.p: instrumented=true → enough_samples=true → over_budget_max=prefill_cold → conclusion: optimise-cache (raise cache_hit_rate from 0.32 toward 0.8).
